steps: Submit NTA Form 11 to Japanese tax authorities requesting refund of JPY 119,850 overpaid withholding tax on Nintendo dividend
Provide MUFG Custody with JP-NO treaty documentation showing 10% rate applies vs. 15.15% withheld
Include client's Norwegian tax residency certificate and Form 1 treaty benefit claim in refund application

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
NTA – Application Forms for Income Tax Convention (Form 1 for dividends)
